title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But the {{c1::economic impact seems}}(似乎有经济影响) to be dramatically behind. It’s very {{c2::difficult to make sense}}(很难理解) of, how can the model, {{c3::on the one hand}}(一方面), do these amazing things, and then {{c4::on the other hand}}(另一方面), repeat itself twice in some situation?
original: But the economic impact seems to be dramatically behind. It’s very difficult to make sense of, how can the model, on the one hand, do these amazing things, and then on the other hand, repeat itself twice in some situation?
translation: 但经济影响似乎远远落后。要理解这一点非常困难：模型怎么可能在一方面做出令人惊叹的事情，另一方面却在某些情况下重复自己两次？
note:
phrases: economic impact seems | difficult to make sense | on the one hand | on the other hand
title: Ilya-Sutskever
source: 
chunk: chunk_0004_b5466e
source_lang: en
target_lang: zh
phrase_types: discourse_organizer | concession_contrast
transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.
expression_transfer: Useful for organizing argument flow across longer explanations.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: There’ll be very strong {{c1::economic forces for}}(经济力量) this, and I think the {{c2::impact is going}}(影响正在) to be felt very strongly. Dwarkesh Patel When do you {{c3::expect that impact}}(预计会有影响)?
original: There’ll be very strong economic forces for this, and I think the impact is going to be felt very strongly. Dwarkesh Patel When do you expect that impact?
translation: 这背后会有非常强大的经济力量推动，我认为其影响将会非常显著。Dwarkesh Patel 你预计这种影响何时会出现？
note:
phrases: economic forces for | impact is going | expect that impact
title: Ilya-Sutskever

target_lang: zh
phrase_types: stance_positioning | strong_collocation

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Dwarkesh Patel {{c1::Another thing}}(还有) that’s crazy is {{c2::how normal}}(多正常啊) {{c3::the slow takeoff}}(缓慢的起步) feels. The idea that we’d be investing 1% of GDP in AI, {{c4::I feel like}}(我觉得) it would have felt like {{c5::a bigger deal}}(更大的影响), whereas right now it just feels...
original: Dwarkesh Patel Another thing that’s crazy is how normal the slow takeoff feels. The idea that we’d be investing 1% of GDP in AI, I feel like it would have felt like a bigger deal, whereas right now it just feels...
translation: Dwarkesh Patel 另一个令人难以置信的地方是，缓慢的发展进程看起来竟然如此正常。如果我们现在投入1%的GDP用于AI，我感觉这本应该是件大事，但现在却只是觉得...
note:
phrases: Another thing | how normal | the slow takeoff | I feel like | a bigger deal
title: Ilya-Sutskever

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: I think the {{c1::impact of AI}}(人工智能的影响) is going to be felt. AI is going to be {{c2::diffused through the economy}}(在经济中扩散).
original: I think the impact of AI is going to be felt. AI is going to be diffused through the economy.
translation: 我认为AI的影响将会显现出来。AI将会在经济中得到广泛应用。
note:
phrases: impact of AI | diffused through the economy

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Dwarkesh Patel {{c1::Should we actually begin}}(我们是否真的应该开始) here? I think this is an interesting discussion.
original: Dwarkesh Patel Should we actually begin here? I think this is an interesting discussion.
translation: 达瓦凯什·帕特尔，我们应该从这里开始吗？我认为这是一个有趣的讨论。

phrases: Should we actually begin

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: I have {{c1::two possible explanations}}(两种可能的解释). The more {{c2::whimsical explanation}}(奇妙的解释) is that maybe {{c3::RL training makes}}(强化学习训练让) the models a little too {{c4::single-minded and narrowly focused}}(变得目标单一且狭隘专注), {{c5::a little bit too unaware}}(对其他事情有些太过无视), even though it also makes them aware in some other ways.
original: I have two possible explanations. The more whimsical explanation is that maybe RL training makes the models a little too single-minded and narrowly focused, a little bit too unaware, even though it also makes them aware in some other ways.
translation: 我有两个可能的解释。更有趣的解释是，也许强化学习训练让模型变得过于专注，过于狭隘，在某种程度上让它们变得不那么敏感，尽管它也让它们在其他方面变得敏感。
note:
phrases: two possible explanations | whimsical explanation | RL training makes | single-minded and narrowly focused | a little bit too unaware
title: Ilya-Sutskever

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Yeah. This is {{c1::one of the very confusing things}}(其中最令人困惑的事情之一) about the models right now. How to {{c2::reconcile the fact that}}(调和这一事实) they are doing so well on evals?
original: Yeah. This is one of the very confusing things about the models right now. How to reconcile the fact that they are doing so well on evals?
translation: 是的。这是目前模型中非常令人困惑的事情之一。如何调和它们在评估中表现如此出色这一事实？
note:
phrases: one of the very confusing things | reconcile the fact that

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Then you tell it, “You {{c1::have this new}}(拥有这个全新的) second bug,” and it tells you, “Oh my God, how {{c2::could I have done}}(我本可以做到) it? You’re {{c3::so right again}}(又对了),”
original: Then you tell it, “You have this new second bug,” and it tells you, “Oh my God, how could I have done it? You’re so right again,”
translation: 然后你告诉它，“你有这个新的第二个错误”，它就会告诉你，“哦我的天，我怎么会犯这样的错误？你又对了。”
note:
phrases: have this new | could I have done | so right again

original: Ilya Sutskever Don’t you think so? All this AI stuff and all this Bay Area… that it’s happening.

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Ilya Sutskever Sure. Dwarkesh Patel I think your point, about how from the average person’s point of view nothing is that different, {{c1::will continue being true}}(将继续保持真实) even into the singularity.
original: Ilya Sutskever Sure. Dwarkesh Patel I think your point, about how from the average person’s point of view nothing is that different, will continue being true even into the singularity.
translation: 伊利亚·苏茨克弗当然。达瓦克什·帕特尔我认为你的观点，即从普通人角度来看，没有什么是真正不同的，即使在奇点到来后也会继续成立。
note:
phrases: will continue being true

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: From what I hear, all the companies have teams that just produce {{c1::new RL environments}}(新的强化学习环境) and just add it to {{c2::the training mix}}(训练混合). The question is, well, what are those?
original: From what I hear, all the companies have teams that just produce new RL environments and just add it to the training mix. The question is, well, what are those?
translation: 据我所闻，所有公司都有团队专门开发新的强化学习环境，并将其添加到训练混合中。问题是，这些环境到底是什么？
note:
phrases: new RL environments | the training mix

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But there is {{c1::another explanation}}(另一种解释). Back when people were doing pre-training, the question of {{c2::what data to train}}(训练什么数据) on was answered, because that answer was everything.
original: But there is another explanation. Back when people were doing pre-training, the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything.
translation: 不过还有另一种解释。在人们进行预训练的时候，训练数据的选择问题已经有了答案，因为那个答案就是所有数据。

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Ilya Sutskever The thing which I was referring to not feeling different is, okay, such and such company announced some difficult-to-comprehend {{c1::dollar amount of}}(美元金额) investment. I don’t think anyone knows what to do with that.
original: Ilya Sutskever The thing which I was referring to not feeling different is, okay, such and such company announced some difficult-to-comprehend dollar amount of investment. I don’t think anyone knows what to do with that.
translation: 伊利亚·苏茨克弗 我提到的那种不觉得有什么不同的感觉是，比如某某公司宣布了某个难以理解的巨额投资。我认为没人知道该如何利用这些资金。

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Back when people were {{c1::doing pre-training}}(进行预训练), the {{c2::question of what data}}(数据的问题) to train on was answered, because that answer was everything. When you do pre-training, you need all the data.
original: Back when people were doing pre-training, the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything. When you do pre-training, you need all the data.
translation: 在人们进行预训练时，训练数据的选择问题已经解决了，因为答案是所有数据。当你进行预训练时，你需要所有的数据。

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: But when people do {{c1::RL training}}(强化学习训练), they do need to think. They say, “Okay, we want to have this {{c2::kind of RL training}}(一种强化学习训练) for this thing and that kind of RL training for that thing.”
original: But when people do RL training, they do need to think. They say, “Okay, we want to have this kind of RL training for this thing and that kind of RL training for that thing.”
translation: 但当人们进行强化学习训练时，他们确实需要思考。他们会说，“好的，我们想要这种类型的强化学习训练用于这个任务，那种类型的强化学习训练用于那个任务。”
note:
phrases: RL training | kind of RL training
title: Ilya-Sutskever

title: Ilya-Sutskever
text: Then you {{c1::tell the model}}(告诉模型), “Can you {{c2::please fix the bug}}(请修复这个错误)?” And the model says, “Oh my God, you’re so right. I have a bug. Let me {{c3::go fix that}}(去修复那个).”
original: Then you tell the model, “Can you please fix the bug?” And the model says, “Oh my God, you’re so right. I have a bug. Let me go fix that.”
translation: 然后你告诉模型：“能不能帮我修一下这个 bug ？”模型就回答：“天啊，您说得对！我确实有一个 bug。让我去修一下吧。”
